identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a Tech-forward & Futuristic AI-gile framework platform that feels like a command center.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Cyberpunk + Swiss Design + Tactical Minimalism.
Emotion First: The user feels powerful, intelligent, and in control.
Content is King: Data is the art. Visualization is the hero.
Negative Space: Use deep void space to make neon accents pop.
Contrast: High contrast text for readability, subtle contrast for hierarchy.

theme.strategy: The 'Void' - Deepest black with electric accents.

typography.font_family_body: JetBrains Mono, Fira Code, Inter, monospace
typography.instructions: Import 'Unbounded' and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts in index.css. Use Unbounded for all H1-H3. Use JetBrains Mono for all data, code, and labels.

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: relative after:absolute after:inset-0 after:rounded-lg after:p-[1px] after:bg-gradient-to-r after:from-transparent after:via-[#00F0FF] after:to-transparent after:opacity-0 hover:after:opacity-100 after:transition-opacity

layout_strategy.dashboard: Bento Grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 p-4 md:p-6
layout_strategy.marketing: Asymmetrical Tetris Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8
layout_strategy.panels: Resizable panels using react-resizable-panels. Left sidebar for Nav/Context, Center for Workspace, Right for Agents/Inspector.
layout_strategy.spacing: Generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside cards to allow data to breathe.

cards.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-xl hover:border-white/20 transition-colors relative overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-[#7000FF] hover:bg-[#6000DD] text-white font-mono uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3 rounded-md shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(112,0,255,0.4)] transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#00F0FF] text-[#00F0FF] hover:bg-[#00F0FF]/10 font-mono uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3 rounded-md transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-muted-foreground hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 font-mono px-4 py-2 rounded-md

inputs.style: bg-black/50 border border-white/10 focus:border-[#00F0FF] text-white rounded-md p-3 font-mono placeholder:text-white/20 transition-colors

badges.style: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-xs font-mono px-2 py-1 rounded text-white/70

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure neon text is not placed on white backgrounds. Use dark backgrounds for neon text.

testing: All interactive elements MUST include 'data-testid' attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Fonts: Add Google Fonts link for 'Unbounded' and 'JetBrains Mono' in 'public/index.html' or import in 'index.css'.
2. Configure Tailwind: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the new color palette (primary, secondary, background, surface).
3. Global CSS: Apply the 'void' background color to the body in 'index.css'.
4. Layouts: Build the Dashboard using a Bento Grid approach. Use 'react-resizable-panels' for the IDE-like workspace.
5. Components: Customize Shadcn components to match the 'Cyberpunk/Tactical' aesthetic (remove heavy roundness, add borders, darken backgrounds).
6. Charts: Use 'recharts' with the custom color palette (Neon Cyan, Electric Violet) for data visualization.
7. Agents: Visualise agents as 'Active Nodes' with pulsing animations using 'tailwindcss-animate'.
